cathepsin_d_differentiation.reason: Cathepsin D lacks mobile flap region

selective_variants.name: HIV_SEL_FLAP_I4
selective_variants.rationale: Isoleucine at position 4 creates hydrophobic contact with C2_Homodimer_A flap region

selective_variants.name: HIV_SEL_FLAP_C_PRO
selective_variants.modification: Add P12 (C-terminal Pro for flap fit)
selective_variants.rationale: Proline rigidifies C-terminus to fit under closing flap

selective_variants.name: HIV_SEL_W5
selective_variants.rationale: Additional tryptophan creates second Z² contact with flap PHE53

selective_variants.name: HIV_SEL_N_R
selective_variants.rationale: Arginine at N-terminus for ASP25 salt bridge

selective_variants.name: HIV_SEL_K7
selective_variants.rationale: Lysine at position 7 forms salt bridge with catalytic ASP25

selective_variants.name: HIV_SEL_R0_K7
selective_variants.rationale: Dual positive charges for maximum ASP25/ASP25-prime engagement

recommendation: HIV_SEL_R0_K7 for ASP25 engagement + HIV_SEL_W5 for flap stacking
